title: NCPIA 1.1.0 major update is live, swing trader mode, PIA trader companion ai, more languages added. (ios submitted too)
author: OrchidProfessional54
selftext:
Hey guys, If you remember from my last post. 

I am the dude who created NCPIA. an app for traders which had been a dream project for me. 

i added some new updates to it. 

Google Playstore: 

https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.ncpialtd.ncpia

the quant tech has now a swing mode which enables weekly and monthly technicals, also helps you see monthly multi resistance n support levels. 

PIA: our trader companion AI has been added. traders remain in a lot of stress. ngl even i got a lot of stress both whenever I'm trading or coding. so everyone needs someone to heal their energy. provide therapy. 

well introducing PIA 💀 a friend, a therapist, a fellow trader, companion. she has 2 modes. bull mode: where she's hyped af.  Bear mode: calculated and disciplined. it's not gonna provide any financial advice as she's solely there to be a companion. 

lastly I added 15 european languages pushing the language options from 37 to 52. so we have 50+ languages officially. 

the update is live on playstore and I finally submitted the app on IOS today so should be live soon for IOS users. they'll be getting this final og version of ncpia out the box 😋😋
